name: proc_creation_win_powershell_import_cert_susp_locations
raw_query: any where (process.command_line:"*Import-Certificate*" and process.command_line:"* -FilePath *" and process.command_line:"*Cert:\\LocalMachine\\Root*") and (process.command_line like~ ("*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*", "*:\\Windows\\TEMP\\*", "*\\Desktop\\*", "*\\Downloads\\*", "*\\Perflogs\\*", "*:\\Users\\Public\\*"))
